ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plot (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the plot (e.g., clay, sand, loam) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the plot (e.g., tropical, temperate, desert) */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the plot (in meters) */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use of the plot (e.g., agriculture, forest, urban) */,
  "land_cover" TEXT /* Land cover of the plot (e.g., grassland, woodland, water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of species (e.g., Bare Ground, Rock, Litter Ground) */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the condition belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_conditions_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the image belongs to */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_images_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the image belongs to */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_notes_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_notes_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the event belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., fire, flood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_history_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the event belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., introduction, extinction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_history_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
